step_rationale: ATP/ADP hydrolysis, anti-thrombotic; blocks platelet activation.
mechanism: CD39 ectonucleotidase hydrolyzes ATP and ADP to adenosine monophosphate, attenuating platelet activation and arterial thrombosis.
